languages.text: {n}Иждриг чуть приподнимает голову и расправляет плечи.{/n} "Она {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ToldBatoshskiAboutPsyker}нашла псайкера{/d} и не убила его. Не позволила обрести искупление для одного. Вместо этого запудрила ему мозги и несчастный колдун приманил Погонщицу прямиком к Клети. Десятки моих людей погибли из-за ее дурости. Может у вас на корабле такое и прощают, но на Заркове мы казним диверсантов".

{n}Izdrig lifts his chin and sets his shoulders.{/n} "She {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ToldBatoshskiAboutPsyker}found a psyker{/d} and let him live. She didn't let him get his atonement. Instead, she filled his head with nonsense, and the poor sorcerer brought the Drover right to the Cage. Dozens of my people are dead thanks to her folly. Maybe you forgive such things on your ship, but on Zarkov, we execute saboteurs."
languages.original_text: {n}Иждриг чуть приподнимает голову и расправляет плечи.{/n} "Она {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ToldBatoshskiAboutPsyker}нашла псайкера{/d} и не убила его. Не позволила обрести искупление для одного. Вместо этого запудрила ему мозги и несчастный колдун приманил Погонщицу прямиком к Клети. Десятки моих людей погибли из-за ее дурости. Может у вас на корабле такое и прощают, но на Заркове мы казним диверсантов".

languages.text: {n}伊兹德里格抬起下巴，挺直肩膀。{/n}“她{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ToldBatoshskiAboutPsyker}发现了一个灵能者{/d}，却留了他活口。她没有让他赎罪，反而往他脑子里灌输那些胡话。结果那可怜的巫师把拒生花直接引到了牢笼跟前。就因为她犯蠢，我几十个手下丢了性命。也许在您的船上可以容忍这种事，但在扎尔科夫，我们会处决破坏分子。”
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig lifts his chin and sets his shoulders.{/n} "She {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ToldBatoshskiAboutPsyker}found a psyker{/d} and let him live. She didn't let him get his atonement. Instead, she filled his head with nonsense, and the poor sorcerer brought the Drover right to the Cage. Dozens of my people are dead thanks to her folly. Maybe you forgive such things on your ship, but on Zarkov, we execute saboteurs."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊兹德里格抬起下巴，挺直肩膀。{/n}“她{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ToldBatoshskiAboutPsyker}发现了一个灵能者{/d}，却留了他活口。她没有让他赎罪，反而往他脑子里灌输那些胡话。结果那可怜的巫师把拒生花直接引到了牢笼跟前。就因为她犯蠢，我几十个手下丢了性命。也许在您的船上可以容忍这种事，但在扎尔科夫，我们会处决破坏分子。”

languages.text: {n}İzdrig, çenesini kaldırıp omuzlarını dikleştiriyor.{/n} "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ToldBatoshskiAboutPsyker}Bir ruhsezer buldu{/d} ve yaşamasına izin verdi. Kefaretini ödemesine müsaade etmedi. Bunun yerine kafasını saçmalıklarla doldurdu ve zavallı sahir, Çoban'ı dosdoğru Kafes'e getirdi. Onun ahmaklığı yüzünden onlarca adamım öldü. Belki geminizde böyle şeyleri affedersiniz ama Zarkov'da biz sabotajcıları idam ederiz."
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig lifts his chin and sets his shoulders.{/n} "She {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ToldBatoshskiAboutPsyker}found a psyker{/d} and let him live. She didn't let him get his atonement. Instead, she filled his head with nonsense, and the poor sorcerer brought the Drover right to the Cage. Dozens of my people are dead thanks to her folly. Maybe you forgive such things on your ship, but on Zarkov, we execute saboteurs."

Kefaretini ödemesine müsaade etmedi. Bunun yerine kafasını saçmalıklarla doldurdu ve zavallı sahir, Çoban'ı dosdoğru Kafes'e getirdi. Onun ahmaklığı yüzünden onlarca adamım öldü. Belki geminizde böyle şeyleri affedersiniz ama Zarkov'da biz sabotajcıları idam ederiz."

languages.text: {n}Izdrig lève le menton et bombe le torse.{/n} « Elle a {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ToldBatoshskiAboutPsyker}épargné un psyker{/d}. Elle l'a privé de son expiation. Elle lui a bourré le crâne d'inepties, et ce pauvre sorcier a mené le Chasseur jusqu'à la Cage. À cause d'elle, des dizaines de mes congénères ont perdu leur vie. Vous êtes peut-être capable de pardonner ce genre de choses, mais sur Zarkov, nous exécutons les saboteurs. »
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig lifts his chin and sets his shoulders.{/n} "She {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ToldBatoshskiAboutPsyker}found a psyker{/d} and let him live. She didn't let him get his atonement. Instead, she filled his head with nonsense, and the poor sorcerer brought the Drover right to the Cage. Dozens of my people are dead thanks to her folly. Maybe you forgive such things on your ship, but on Zarkov, we execute saboteurs."

Elle lui a bourré le crâne d'inepties, et ce pauvre sorcier a mené le Chasseur jusqu'à la Cage. À cause d'elle, des dizaines de mes congénères ont perdu leur vie. languages.text: {n}Izdrig alza la barbilla y se cuadra de hombros.{/n} «{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ToldBatoshskiAboutPsyker}Encontró a un psíquico{/d} y le permitió vivir. No dejó que cumpliera su penitencia. En lugar de eso, le llenó la cabeza de ideas absurdas y el pobre hechicero atrajo al Pastor directo hasta la Jaula. Una veintena de mis hombres pagaron su estupidez con sus vidas. Quizá usted perdone esas cosas en su nave, pero, en Zarkov, ejecutamos a los saboteadores».
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig lifts his chin and sets his shoulders.{/n} "She {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ToldBatoshskiAboutPsyker}found a psyker{/d} and let him live. languages.text: {n}Izdrig hebt sein Kinn und strafft die Schultern.{/n} "Sie {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ToldBatoshskiAboutPsyker}hat einen Psioniker gefunden{/d} und am Leben gelassen. Damit hat sie ihm die Sühne verwehrt. Stattdessen hat sie ihm Flausen in den Kopf gesetzt, und der arme Hexer hat den Treiber schnurstracks in den Käfig geführt. Dieser Unsinn hat Dutzende meiner Leute das Leben gekostet. Vielleicht verzeiht Ihr derartige Dinge auf Eurem Schiff ja, aber auf Zarkov werden Saboteure exekutiert."
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig lifts his chin and sets his shoulders.{/n} "She {d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ToldBatoshskiAboutPsyker}found a psyker{/d} and let him live. She didn't let him get his atonement. Instead, she filled his head with nonsense, and the poor sorcerer brought the Drover right to the Cage. Dozens of my people are dead thanks to her folly. Maybe you forgive such things on your ship, but on Zarkov, we execute saboteurs."

Stattdessen hat sie ihm Flausen in den Kopf gesetzt, und der arme Hexer hat den Treiber schnurstracks in den Käfig geführt. Dieser Unsinn hat Dutzende meiner Leute das Leben gekostet. Vielleicht verzeiht Ihr derartige Dinge auf Eurem Schiff ja, aber auf Zarkov werden Saboteure exekutiert."

languages.text: {n}イズドリックは首を上げ、肩をすくめた。{/n}「彼女は{d|Encyclopedia:Ch2_ToldBatoshskiAboutPsyker}サイカーを見つけ{/d}、彼を助けた。彼の贖罪を許さなかった。代わりに、彼の頭の中をくだらない話で満たし、気の毒な魔法使いはドルーバーを檻に連れて行った。数十人の私の仲間が彼女の愚かさで死んだ。船の中では許されるかもしれないが、ザルコフでは、破壊工作員は処刑される」
